---
title: "Simulation for examplary raw data"
format: html
eval: false 
---

```{r}
#| label: generate-and-save
#| include: false

# 1. Load library for paths
if (!require("here")) install.packages("here")
library(here)

# 2. Create directory if it doesn't exist
dir.create(here("data", "raw"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# 3. Generate synthetic research data
set.seed(42)
n <- 100
my_data <- data.frame(
  id = 1:n,
  age = round(runif(n, 18, 65)),
  condition = sample(c("Control", "Treatment"), n, replace = TRUE),
  reaction_time = rlnorm(n, meanlog = 0.5, sdlog = 0.3),
  attention_check = sample(c("passed", "failed"), n, replace = TRUE, prob = c(0.9, 0.1))
)

# 4. Save to CSV
write.csv(my_data, here("data", "raw", "my_data.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

message("Success: data/raw/my_data.csv has been created!")
```
